hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; \$n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$n.Visible = \$true; \$n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, 'Claude Done', 'Claude has finished!', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; \$n.Dispose()"
